title: You Will Find Rest

sections.label: Lyrics
lines: Worn down by the weight of days
Echoes loud in crowded haze
Endless scroll, no time to pray
Losing light along the way
But in the stillness, I hear Your voice
Not with pressure, but a quiet choice
Come to me, all you who are weary
And burdened hearts, I’ll carry
Take my yoke, I’m gentle and low
You will find rest — you will find rest for your soul
Expectations, always near
Failures whispered loud and clear
But grace moves like ocean air
Lifting sorrow, light as prayer
You don’t have to earn your peace
In My arms, the striving ceases
Come to me, all you who are weary
And burdened hearts, I’ll carry
Take my yoke, I’m gentle and low
You will find rest — you will find rest for your soul
My burden is light
My presence is near
You’re not alone
I'm always here
Come to me, all you who are weary
And burdened hearts, I’ll carry
Take my yoke, I’m gentle and low
You will find rest — you will find rest for your soul
You will find rest
You will find rest

epigraph: and ye shall find rest unto your souls
styleNote: Gentle Vinyl Crackle · Lo-Fi Drum Groove Enters · Vocal Harmony Rising
